traditional.title: Traditional management interfaces
traditional.point1: An outdated UI that slows you down
traditional.point2: No unified view across servers or environments

qarote.title: Qarote
qarote.point1: A clean, modern UI built for speed and clarity
qarote.point2: A unified dashboard for all your servers and environments
qarote.point3: Smart, actionable alerts that catch issues early
qarote.point4: Zero-setup monitoring, no scripts, no maintenance

liveQueueMonitoring.title: Live queue monitoring
liveQueueMonitoring.description: See queue depths, message rates, and consumer counts update in real time without refreshing. Qarote streams metrics directly from the RabbitMQ Management HTTP API, so you catch message accumulation and processing slowdowns the moment they happen. Track ready, unacknowledged, and total message counts across every queue in a single view.

smartAlertingSystem.title: Smart alerting system
smartAlertingSystem.description: Define custom thresholds for queue backlogs, memory usage, disk space, and message rates. When a threshold is breached, Qarote sends severity-based notifications via email, Slack, browser push, or webhook—so the right person is alerted before users notice. Alerts are evaluated continuously, not on a polling interval, reducing mean time to detection.

queueManagement.title: Queue management
queueManagement.description: Pause, resume, purge, and delete queues with one click instead of running rabbitmqctl commands. Create exchanges, bind queues, and manage routing keys through an intuitive interface that shows bindings visually. Qarote supports direct, topic, fanout, and headers exchange types across RabbitMQ 3.x and 4.x.

performanceAnalytics.title: Performance analytics
performanceAnalytics.description: Track memory usage, disk space, file descriptors, Erlang process counts, and message throughput over time. Qarote renders trends as interactive charts so you can spot capacity issues before they cause outages. Compare metrics across servers and time ranges to identify performance regressions and plan scaling decisions.

multiServerSupport.title: Multi-server support
multiServerSupport.description: Connect production, staging, and development RabbitMQ clusters in one dashboard and switch between them instantly. Organize servers into workspaces by team or environment. Each connection is isolated, so a misconfigured staging broker never affects your production view. Supports both single-node and clustered deployments.

messagePublishing.title: Message publishing
messagePublishing.description: Publish test messages directly to queues and exchanges from the dashboard—no code, no CLI. Set routing keys, headers, content type, and delivery mode before sending. Ideal for debugging consumer logic, verifying exchange routing rules, and reproducing production issues in a safe environment without writing throwaway scripts.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Self-Hosted Solution
enterprise.description: For organizations requiring on-premise deployment, complete data control, and enterprise-grade features. Deploy Qarote in your own infrastructure with full access to advanced capabilities.
enterprise.unlimitedServersDesc: Monitor as many RabbitMQ servers as you need
enterprise.advancedSecurityDesc: Complete control over your data and deployment

connection.title: Connect easily with your RabbitMQ servers
connection.subtitle: Don't change the way your RabbitMQ servers work, Qarote is specially made for this message broker.
